raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.3": 4, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes.",
    "R1.3": "Checks claim-evidence linkage by identifying unsupported claims and suggesting revisions.",
    "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty about the underlying numbers, human baseline source, and seed counts.",
    "RX.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the provided paragraph.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while highlighting potential issues in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Annotates each recommendation with confidence levels and missing evidence."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes.
rationale.R1.3: Checks claim-evidence linkage by identifying unsupported claims and suggesting revisions.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty about the underlying numbers, human baseline source, and seed counts.
rationale.RX.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the provided paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while highlighting potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Annotates each recommendation with confidence levels and missing evidence.
